name: Littoral
description: The economic heartbeat of Cameroon, featuring coastal lowlands, industrial zones, and vibrant city life.

name: Centre
description: The political capital region, rich in cultural monuments, lush forests, and government institutions.

name: West
description: The cultural highlands known for its cooler climate, rich traditional chiefdoms, and intricate artisan crafts.

name: Northwest
description: Beautiful grassy highlands offering spectacular mountain views, crater lakes, and rich Anglophone culture.

name: Southwest
description: Home to the majestic Mount Cameroon, dark sand beaches, and incredible biodiversity.

name: Far North
description: A stunning semi-arid landscape featuring dramatic volcanic plugs, savannas, and rich wildlife.

name: North
description: Extensive national parks, savanna ecosystems, and impressive geological formations like the Kola Gorges.

name: Adamawa
description: The water tower of Cameroon. A transitional zone of volcanic craters, crater lakes, and sprawling cattle ranches.

name: East
description: Vast, untouched equatorial rainforests with massive biodiversity, indigenous Pygmy communities, and logging towns.

name: South
description: Pristine coastal beaches, deep equatorial forests, and the famous Lobe waterfalls meeting the ocean.
